goal.name: integration-test
goal.description: Runs integration tests using Failsafe. Binds to the integration-test lifecycle phase.

parameter.name: includes
parameter.description: List of patterns (Ant-style or regex) for integration test classes to include. Default patterns: **/IT*.java, **/*IT.java, **/*ITCase.java. User property: failsafe.includes

parameter.name: excludes
parameter.description: List of patterns for integration test classes to exclude. User property: failsafe.excludes

parameter.name: includesFile
parameter.description: File containing include patterns (one per line). User property: failsafe.includesFile

parameter.name: excludesFile
parameter.description: File containing exclude patterns (one per line). User property: failsafe.excludesFile

parameter.name: test
parameter.description: Run specific integration test class or method (e.g., -Dit.test=MyIT or -Dit.test=MyIT#myMethod). User property: it.test

parameter.name: groups
parameter.description: JUnit 5 tag expression / TestNG group filter: only tests in matching groups are run. User property: groups

parameter.name: excludedGroups
parameter.description: JUnit 5 tag expression / TestNG group filter: tests in matching groups are excluded. User property: excludedGroups

parameter.name: includeJUnit5Engines
parameter.description: JUnit 5 engine IDs to include (others are excluded). User property: surefire.includeJUnit5Engines

parameter.name: excludeJUnit5Engines
parameter.description: JUnit 5 engine IDs to exclude from integration test execution. User property: surefire.excludeJUnit5Engines

parameter.name: dependenciesToScan
parameter.description: Dependency coordinates (groupId:artifactId) whose JARs are also scanned for integration test classes. User property: dependenciesToScan

parameter.name: suiteXmlFiles
parameter.description: TestNG suite XML files to use for test configuration. User property: failsafe.suiteXmlFiles

parameter.name: testSourceDirectory
parameter.description: Directory containing test source files (used for TestNG HTML reports). Default: ${project.build.testSourceDirectory}

parameter.name: testClassesDirectory
parameter.description: Directory containing compiled test classes. Default: ${project.build.testOutputDirectory}

parameter.name: classesDirectory
parameter.description: Directory containing compiled main classes added to the test classpath. Default: ${project.build.outputDirectory}

parameter.name: additionalClasspathElements
parameter.description: Extra JARs or directories appended to the integration test classpath. User property: maven.test.additionalClasspath

parameter.name: additionalClasspathDependencies
parameter.description: Maven dependencies (with transitive resolution) added to the integration test classpath. User property: maven.test.additionalClasspathDependencies

parameter.name: classpathDependencyExcludes
parameter.description: Dependencies excluded from the integration test classpath (groupId:artifactId patterns). User property: maven.test.dependency.excludes

parameter.name: classpathDependencyScopeExclude
parameter.description: Dependency scope to exclude from the integration test classpath (e.g. compile, runtime, test)

parameter.name: useModulePath
parameter.description: Put test classes on the module path when module-info.java is present (JDK 9+). User property: failsafe.useModulePath

parameter.name: useSystemClassLoader
parameter.description: Use system classloader to load test classes (prevents SPI lookup issues). User property: failsafe.useSystemClassLoader

parameter.name: childDelegation
parameter.description: Use standard parent-first classloader delegation instead of isolated classloader. User property: childDelegation

parameter.name: summaryFile
parameter.description: File to which integration test results summary is written (read by verify goal). Default: ${project.build.directory}/failsafe-reports/failsafe-summary.xml

parameter.name: reportsDirectory
parameter.description: Base directory where integration test reports are written. Default: ${project.build.directory}/failsafe-reports

parameter.name: reportFormat
parameter.description: Console report format: brief or plain. User property: failsafe.reportFormat

parameter.name: reportNameSuffix
parameter.description: Custom suffix appended to report file names. User property: surefire.reportNameSuffix

parameter.name: encoding
parameter.description: Character encoding for report files. Default: ${project.reporting.outputEncoding}. User property: encoding

parameter.name: useFile
parameter.description: Write test output to file-based reports (false = console only). User property: failsafe.useFile

parameter.name: redirectTestOutputToFile
parameter.description: Redirect test stdout/stderr to a per-test output file. User property: maven.test.redirectTestOutputToFile

parameter.name: trimStackTrace
parameter.description: Trim stack traces in test reports to lines inside test classes only. User property: trimStackTrace

parameter.name: enableOutErrElements
parameter.description: Include system-out and system-err elements in XML reports. User property: enableOutErrElements

parameter.name: enablePropertiesElement
parameter.description: Include properties element in XML reports. User property: enablePropertiesElement

parameter.name: testFailureIgnore
parameter.description: Continue build even if integration tests fail (not recommended). User property: maven.test.failure.ignore

parameter.name: failIfNoTests
parameter.description: Fail the build if no integration tests were run. User property: failIfNoTests

parameter.name: failIfNoSpecifiedTests
parameter.description: Fail if the -Dit.test= pattern matches no tests. User property: failsafe.failIfNoSpecifiedTests

parameter.name: rerunFailingTestsCount
parameter.description: Rerun failing integration tests up to N times; passing reruns are reported as flakes. User property: failsafe.rerunFailingTestsCount

parameter.name: skipAfterFailureCount
parameter.description: Skip remaining integration tests after N test failures/errors (0 = never skip). User property: failsafe.skipAfterFailureCount

parameter.name: failOnFlakeCount
parameter.description: Fail the build if cumulative flake count reaches N (0 = unlimited). User property: failsafe.failOnFlakeCount

parameter.name: junitArtifactName
parameter.description: Artifact coordinate used to detect JUnit version on classpath. User property: junitArtifactName

parameter.name: testNGArtifactName
parameter.description: Artifact coordinate used to detect TestNG version on classpath. User property: testNGArtifactName

parameter.name: objectFactory
parameter.description: (TestNG only) Factory class for creating integration test instances. User property: objectFactory

parameter.name: properties
parameter.description: Provider-specific configuration properties (e.g., TestNG listener configuration)

parameter.name: forkCount
parameter.description: Number of JVM processes to fork: integer, decimal (e.g., 1.5C = 1.5x CPUs), or 0 (no fork). User property: forkCount

parameter.name: reuseForks
parameter.description: Reuse forked JVMs across integration test classes (false = new VM per class). User property: reuseForks

parameter.name: jvm
parameter.description: Path to the Java executable used for forked processes. User property: jvm

parameter.name: jdkToolchain
parameter.description: Toolchain requirements map (version, vendor) to select the JVM for forked processes

parameter.name: argLine
parameter.description: JVM arguments for forked integration test processes (supports @{property} late-replacement). User property: argLine

parameter.name: workingDirectory
parameter.description: Working directory for forked integration test processes. User property: basedir

parameter.name: environmentVariables
parameter.description: Additional environment variables passed to forked integration test processes

parameter.name: excludedEnvironmentVariables
parameter.description: Environment variables to exclude from inheritance in forked processes. User property: failsafe.excludedEnvironmentVariables

parameter.name: useManifestOnlyJar
parameter.description: Use manifest-only JAR for classpath when forking (avoids OS command-line length limits). User property: failsafe.useManifestOnlyJar

parameter.name: forkedProcessTimeoutInSeconds
parameter.description: Kill forked process if it runs longer than N seconds (0 = never). User property: failsafe.timeout

parameter.name: forkedProcessExitTimeoutInSeconds
parameter.description: Timeout for forked process to terminate gracefully after tests complete. User property: failsafe.exitTimeout

parameter.name: shutdown
parameter.description: JVM shutdown strategy: exit, testset, or kill. User property: failsafe.shutdown

parameter.name: enableProcessChecker
parameter.description: Enable process checkers to detect native subprocesses: ping, native, or all. User property: failsafe.enableProcessChecker

parameter.name: tempDir
parameter.description: Relative path within ${project.build.directory} used for surefire boot files. User property: tempDir

parameter.name: parallel
parameter.description: Parallel execution mode: classes, methods, classesAndMethods, suites, suitesAndClasses, suitesAndMethods, all, none. User property: parallel

parameter.name: threadCount
parameter.description: Total number of threads for parallel integration test execution. User property: threadCount

parameter.name: threadCountSuites
parameter.description: Thread count for concurrent test suites in parallel mode. User property: threadCountSuites

parameter.name: threadCountClasses
parameter.description: Thread count for concurrent test classes in parallel mode. User property: threadCountClasses

parameter.name: threadCountMethods
parameter.description: Thread count for concurrent test methods in parallel mode. User property: threadCountMethods

parameter.name: perCoreThreadCount
parameter.description: Treat threadCount values as per-CPU-core multipliers. User property: perCoreThreadCount

parameter.name: useUnlimitedThreads
parameter.description: Use an unbounded thread pool for parallel execution (overrides threadCount). User property: useUnlimitedThreads

parameter.name: parallelOptimized
parameter.description: Automatically optimize parallel thread counts to avoid exceeding available resources. User property: parallelOptimized

parameter.name: parallelTestsTimeoutInSeconds
parameter.description: Timeout in seconds for queued parallel integration tests (0 = wait forever). User property: failsafe.parallel.timeout

parameter.name: parallelTestsTimeoutForcedInSeconds
parameter.description: Force-interrupt running parallel integration tests after N seconds (0 = never). User property: failsafe.parallel.forcedTimeout

parameter.name: systemPropertyVariables
parameter.description: System properties passed to the integration test JVM (values may embed paths)

parameter.name: systemPropertiesFile
parameter.description: Properties file whose entries are set as system properties for integration tests. User property: failsafe.systemPropertiesFile

parameter.name: promoteUserPropertiesToSystemProperties
parameter.description: Pass Maven user-defined properties (-D) as JVM system properties to the test provider

parameter.name: runOrder
parameter.description: Execution order of integration test classes: filesystem, alphabetical, reversealphabetical, random, hourly, failedfirst, balanced. User property: failsafe.runOrder

parameter.name: runOrderRandomSeed
parameter.description: Seed for random integration test ordering (for reproducible randomisation). User property: failsafe.runOrder.random.seed

parameter.name: printSummary
parameter.description: Print a summary line for each integration test suite after execution. User property: failsafe.printSummary

parameter.name: enableAssertions
parameter.description: Enable JVM assertion checking (-ea) in integration test processes. User property: enableAssertions

parameter.name: skip
parameter.description: Bypass integration test compilation and execution entirely. User property: maven.test.skip

parameter.name: skipTests
parameter.description: Skip integration test execution but still compile them. User property: skipTests

parameter.name: skipITs
parameter.description: Skip running integration tests but still compile them. User property: skipITs

goal.name: verify
goal.description: Verifies integration test results produced by failsafe:integration-test. Binds to the verify lifecycle phase.

parameter.name: summaryFile
parameter.description: Summary file to read integration test results from. Default: ${project.build.directory}/failsafe-reports/failsafe-summary.xml

parameter.name: summaryFiles
parameter.description: Additional summary files to include when verifying integration test results (e.g. for multi-module aggregation)

parameter.name: reportsDirectory
parameter.description: Directory where integration test reports reside. Default: ${project.build.directory}/failsafe-reports

parameter.name: testFailureIgnore
parameter.description: Ignore integration test failures during verification (not recommended). User property: maven.test.failure.ignore

parameter.name: failIfNoTests
parameter.description: Fail the build if no integration tests were found. User property: failIfNoTests

parameter.name: failOnFlakeCount
parameter.description: Fail the build if cumulative flake count reaches N (0 = unlimited). User property: failsafe.failOnFlakeCount

parameter.name: skip
parameter.description: Bypass integration test verification entirely. User property: maven.test.skip

parameter.name: skipTests
parameter.description: Skip integration test verification. User property: skipTests

parameter.name: skipITs
parameter.description: Skip verification of integration test results. User property: skipITs

goal.name: help
goal.description: Displays help information on available goals and parameters.

parameter.name: detail
parameter.description: Show parameter details for the specified goal. User property: detail

parameter.name: goal
parameter.description: Name of the goal for which to show detailed help. User property: goal

parameter.name: lineLength
parameter.description: Maximum line length for help output formatting. User property: lineLength

parameter.name: indentSize
parameter.description: Number of spaces per indentation level in help output. User property: indentSize
